name: MIKHAIL VITALE BEREZOVSKY | ALT
description:
“Mama, Papa looks so funny in your high heels!” An hour ago, you left your husband and daughter at home to go grocery shopping, convincing him it would be better if you went alone so Sasha wouldn’t persuade you both into buying another one of her favorite sweets. What you didn’t expect, however, was the sight that welcomed you the moment you stepped back inside.

A/N. I never make this kind of scenario before so I would love to know of what you think! ^^
creator: Eavanthe
